verdict: Stephen Curry remains an elite, high-impact point guard with a proven ability to significantly elevate team performance and playoff odds.
strengths: His 0.705 impact score and 83rd percentile ranking, contributing 9.4 wins and a 93.9% playoff probability, highlight his consistent, elite efficiency.
concern: While steady, the requested $40M salary implies a 12% overpay compared to his $35.72M fair value, necessitating strategic negotiation.
recommendation: Prioritize retaining Curry; negotiate towards his fair value, recognizing his foundational impact on winning and consistent elite output.
audio_summary: Stephen Curry is a remarkably consistent and high-impact player, adding significant wins and ensuring playoff contention. Despite a slight overpay in his request, his elite efficiency and steady performance make him a priority for retention.
